notes: Implements Silverman IV.7 height of formal group homomorphisms: two noncomputable defs (FormalGroupHom.height, FormalGroup.height) and five lemmas including the main additivity result height_comp. The private helper ENat.map_padicValNat_mul distributes padicValNat over ℕ∞-multiplication; the file is only imported by the top-level barrel HasseWeil.lean, so all public declarations are API leaves with no internal consumers beyond this file.
